templates.title: 湘西吊脚楼蓝图演绎
templates.desc: 将建筑主体与技术蓝图叠加的高真实度影像模板
templates.prompt_template: Create a professional realistic photo of {subject}. Use {lighting} lighting. Background: {background}. Add technical blueprint overlays with white lines, arrows, dimensions, labels, and mini diagrams.
templates.author: MrLarus
templates.final_prompt: Create a professional realistic photo of Xiangxi stilted building. Use golden-hour lighting. Background: dark green bokeh. Add technical blueprint overlays with white lines, arrows, dimensions, labels, and mini diagrams.
